channel.title: Smartypants
channel.description: Latest releases from Smartypants on Dropout.tv

item.title: Cut For Time: Secret Agenda Items
item.description:
Take a look at all the secret agenda items that were cut from season 2 of Smartypants.

Duration: 21:22

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories
